update: {
  prefix: {
    origin: "openconfig"
  }
  delete: {
    elem: {name: "network-instances"}
    elem: {
      name: "network-instance"
      key: {
        key: "name"
        value: "default"
      }
    }
    elem: {name: "connection-points"}
    elem: {
      name: "connection-point"
      key: {
        key: "connection-point-id"
        value: "patch-1001"
      }
    }
    elem: {name: "state"}
    elem: {name: "status"}
  }
  timestamp: 123456789
}
